name: Olive Garden Raspberry Mousse Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium until thoroughly blended, about 3 to 4 minutes. Pour into the prepared crust. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes. Cool to refrigerated temperature.
3. For the mousse: Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and stir. Let stand 1 minute. Microwave on HIGH for 30 seconds or until gelatin is completely dissolved (or heat on stove with an additional 1 tablespoon of water). Combine gelatin with preserves and chill for 10 minutes.
4. Whip cream until soft peaks form. Add 2 tablespoons sugar and continue whipping until stiff peaks form. Measure out 1 1/2 cups of whipped cream for the mousse and set aside. Refrigerate the remainder of the cream for topping.
5. Gently fold the raspberry mixture into the measured whipped cream. Spread the raspberry mousse on top of the chilled cheesecake, mounding slightly in the center. Chill for 1 hour before serving.
6. To serve, cut cheesecake into 6 servings and top each piece with a dollop of reserved whipped cream.
